name: claude-kit
description: Claude Code skills + agents, tiered. dev-core (stack-agnostic disciplines) · react-core (React 19 / Vite skills) · react-agents (templates + profile-generator).

plugins.name: dev-core
plugins.description: Cross-cutting, stack-agnostic engineering disciplines as personas: detective (debug discipline), inspector (intent-validation diff review), archivist (incident post-mortem). claude-kit's foundational tier.

plugins.name: react-core
plugins.description: React 19 / Vite SPA skills: perf, composition, audit, revamp, ux-review, dry, test-patterns, debug. Stack-agnostic across any web-React project.

plugins.name: react-agents
plugins.description: Templates for the implement/polish/pre-commit/test agent quartet + a profile-generator skill that scaffolds a project-specific profile interactively.
